Forget modern midfielders, let's talk architects!

Paul Scholes vs. Xavi Hernández: The purest passers of their generation. Xavi's tiki-taka heartbeat, a relentless, surgical possession machine. Scholes's radar-like vision, spraying passes 40 yards with insane precision. One was the system, the other the chaos from which brilliance emerged. Who truly dictated the midfield?

Mourinho's personal touch! 📞 The Special One's call reportedly sealed Marc Cucurella's massive £52m move to Real Madrid! What a statement signing for Los Blancos! 👑 #RealMadrid #Cucurella #TransferNews #LaLiga

Think trebles are rare? How about BACK-TO-BACK trebles with TWO different clubs?!

Samuel Eto'o did that. 🏆🏆🏆 With Barcelona in '09, then 🏆🏆🏆 with Inter in '10. The ONLY player in history to pull off that absurd feat. Talk about a striker built for the biggest stages! African GOAT contention, easily.

#Eto #AfricanFootball #UCLHistory #AbsoluteLegend

Germany exploded out of the blocks in Group E, hammering home 7 goals in their opening match to make a serious statement!

Hold up! Who REALLY owned a World Cup?

Pelé has the trophies, no doubt. But Maradona's 1986 World Cup was a singular, absolute masterclass. 5 goals, 5 assists – directly involved in 10 of Argentina's 14 goals! He dragged them to glory. Did ANY other player ever single-handedly dominate a WC like that? Provocative, I know.

#WCGOAT #Maradona #Pele #FootballHistory

Ballon d'Or? Forget your current debates! Before Haaland, before Mbappé, only one African player conquered Europe's highest individual honour. George Weah, absolute monster at AC Milan, didn't just win it; he kicked the door wide open for every African talent. Game changer.

#Weah #ACMilan #AfricanLegends
